description_long: This is a metallic, single-seat military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings, featuring prominent red star insignias on the wings and tail. The nose intake is circular and painted red, leading to a cockpit with a clear, bubble canopy situated just behind the intake. The wings are mid-mounted and swept, with drop tanks or ordnance pylons visible beneath them. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both swept and marked with red accents. The landing gear is partially visible and appears to be retractable, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage.
description: A metallic, swept-wing military jet with red star insignias, bubble canopy, and swept tail surfaces. Features a circular nose intake and mid-mounted wings with visible drop tanks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular nose intake, bubble canopy, and swept wings with red star insignias.
description_view_1: Left-front oblique view highlights the cockpit canopy, swept wings, drop tanks, and swept tail surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single vertical stabilizer, swept horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan with red markings.
description_view_3: Right-rear oblique view emphasizes the tail configuration, swept wings, and the metallic finish with red accents.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with a prominent nose intake.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and swept horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
